title: Non-record: Hybrid SSM Scene Overview
author: Teddygat0r

data.description: Experimented with state space model layers as an alternative to standard attention to improve performance under the small parameter limit.
Hybrid SSM approach combining SSM layers with a regular attention-based model, motivated by parameter efficiency.

novel_contributions: Experimented with SSM layers for parameter-efficient modeling
Hybrid SSM scene overview / hybrid SSM approach
Observed that SSM training time complexity (O(n log n) per sequence) was too slow to be competitive with optimized attention kernels
